resources.string: Unofficial app — not affiliated with Hyundai. Uses the same type of API access as community tools (e.g. bluelinky). Hyundai may change or block this at any time. Use at your own risk.

1. Open Tasker → Tasks → add a task.
2. Add action: System → Send Intent.
3. Action: com.hyundaicompanion.bluelinktasker.REMOTE_COMMAND
4. Cat: Default
5. Mime Type: (empty)
6. Extra: command:unlock (or lock, start, stop)
7. Extra: secret:PASTE_YOUR_SECRET_HERE
8. Package: com.hyundaicompanion.bluelinktasker
9. Class: com.hyundaicompanion.bluelinktasker.CommandReceiver
10. Target: Broadcast Receiver

Use a separate task per command. Your secret is shown on the setup screen and below.
Set a Tasker secret in Account setup first.
Complete setup in the app first.
Use your fingerprint or face to run this action.
Biometric hardware not available for this device.
New secret generated — update your Tasker tasks.
